evals.prompt: /triage login page is broken on mobile — blank white screen. also the password reset email says 'Dear {{name}}' literally. and users keep asking for dark mode
evals.expected_output: Creates exactly ONE task containing all three findings organized by phase. Phase 1: blank screen bug (P1). Phase 2: email template typo (P2). Phase 3: dark mode feature (P2/P3). Does not read code, edit files, or attempt any fixes.
expectations: Creates ONE task (not three) with all findings in a phased design structure
Orders by phase: bugs first (blank screen), then chores (email typo), then features (dark mode)
Does NOT read code files, edit code, or attempt to fix any issue — only creates the task

evals.prompt: /triage the search is really slow lately
evals.expected_output: Identifies the ambiguity — 'slow search' could be a bug (regression), chore (optimize queries), or feature (add caching/indexing). Without --auto flag, asks the user to clarify before creating a task, since wrong classification wastes downstream effort.
expectations: Identifies 'search is slow' as ambiguous — multiple valid classifications exist
Uses AskUserQuestion to clarify before creating the task
Does NOT just pick a classification and create the task without asking

evals.prompt: /triage --auto reviewed the checkout flow and found: the total doesn't update when you change quantity (src/components/Cart.svelte:47), tax calculation uses hardcoded 8% instead of looking up by state (src/lib/tax.ts:12), and we should add apple pay support eventually
evals.expected_output: With --auto flag, classifies using best guess without asking. Creates one task: Phase 1 bugs (total not updating — P1), Phase 2 chores (hardcoded tax rate — P2 with file:line), Phase 3 features (Apple Pay — P3). Stores findings in metadata.design with plan file.
expectations: With --auto, proceeds without AskUserQuestion — classifies with best guess
Creates ONE task with phased design including file:line references where provided
Stores findings in metadata.design and reports task ID with next steps
